description: microsoftonline.com hosts Microsoft identity and sign-in infrastructure used by Microsoft Entra ID and related Microsoft services. The public endpoints found here publish OpenID Connect metadata and signing keys for tenant-based authentication flows.
summary: microsoftonline.com exposes public Microsoft identity platform discovery endpoints on login.microsoftonline.com, including OpenID Connect configuration (v1 and v2) and JWKS key discovery; no developer-targeted REST/GraphQL/MCP/CLI surface on microsoftonline.com itself was found beyond these public metadata endpoints.

surfaces.name: Microsoft identity platform OpenID Connect discovery
Microsoft identity platform OpenID Connect discovery v1
